title: Apr 30, 2026Amazon Is Regaining 1P Unit ShareThird-party sellers accounted for 60% of paid units sold on Amazon in Q1 2026, down from 61% in Q4 2025 and 62% the quarter before that. It's the first time the metric has fallen for two consecutive quarters since Amazon began breaking it out in its quarterly reports in 2004.
